reasoning: Anthropic recently raised a massive private funding round in March 2025 ($3.5B at a $61.5B valuation), securing extensive capital and reducing the immediate need for an IPO. Furthermore, as of mid-May 2025 (45 days before the resolution date), there are zero rumors or reports of Anthropic hiring investment banks or drafting an S-1 registration statement, which typically precede an IPO announcement by several months. Given the short timeframe until July 1, 2025, and their ability to raise significant funds in private markets, an IPO announcement is highly unlikely.
